zh.lifeSummary: 當John Boteler於1435年出生在英國斯塔福爾諾波利時，他的父親Philip Boteler21歲，母親Isabel Willoughby17歲。他於1474年與Constance de Vere在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1490年被列為sheriff of essex and herfordshire。他去世於1504年在英國英格蘭賀福爾沃爾頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Boteler于1435年出生在英国斯塔福爾諾波利时，他的父亲Philip Boteler21岁，母亲Isabel Willoughby17岁。他于1474年与Constance de Vere在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1490年被列为sheriff of essex and herfordshire。他去世于1504年在英国英格兰賀福爾沃爾頓享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Boteler was born in 1435, in Norbury, Staffordshire, England, his father, Philip Boteler, was 21 and his mother, Isabel Willoughby, was 17. He married Constance de Vere in 1474, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1490, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as sheriff of essex and herfordshire. He died in 1504, in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Boteler est né en 1435, à Norbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Boteler, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Willoughby, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Constance de Vere en 1474, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1490, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of essex and herfordshire. Il est décédé en 1504, à Walton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Boteler 1435 in Norbury, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Boteler 21 und seine Mutter Isabel Willoughby 17. Er hat 1474 in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Constance de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1490, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of essex and herfordshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1504 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Boteler è nato il nel 1435 nel Norbury, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Philip Boteler, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Willoughby, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Constance de Vere nel 1474, nel Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1490, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of essex and herfordshire. Morì nel 1504, nel Walton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Botelerが1435年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Philip Botelerは21歳，母Isabel Willoughbyは17歳であった。1474年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンでConstance de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1490年，55歳の時，職業はsheriff of essex and herfordshireと記録されている。彼は1504年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアワルトンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Woodhall, Watton, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: John Boteler(이)가 1435년 영국 스태퍼드실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Boteler(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Willoughby(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 Constance de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1490년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of essex and herfordshire이었다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 월턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Boteler nasceu em 1435, em Norbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Boteler, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Willoughby, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance de Vere em 1474, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1490, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of essex and herfordshire. Ele faleceu em 1504, em Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Woodhall, Watton, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Boteler родился в 1435 г. в местности норбури, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Boteler было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Willoughby, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de Vere в 1474 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1490 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of essex and herfordshire. Он умер в 1504 г. в местности валтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.St Dunstan and All Saints, London, Engla: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Astwell, West Northamptonshire district,: Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Woodhall, Watton, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Boteler nació en 1435, en Norbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Boteler, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Willoughby, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Constance de Vere en 1474, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1490, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of essex and herfordshire. Murió en 1504, en Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
